2288520.name: The Quiet Things
2288520.description:
“I didn’t know how to tell you what happened to me, so I put it in a game…”

It’s the year 2000, but everything is about to change.

Based on real diary entries, police records and accounts, The Quiet Things tells the story of Alice, as she tries to make sense of the world around her. Step behind closed doors, in this immersive, narrative driven experience.

GAME FEATURES

·      An auto-biographical game, featuring real diary entries

·      Explore beautiful re-creations of life in the 00s

·      Renowned voice cast: Emily Burnett, Dave Jones, Iestyn Arwel, Anthony Howell & more

·      Atmospheric soundtrack, including arrangements of songs & original music by Alyx Jones

·      6-8 hours of gameplay

LIFTING THE STIGMA

The Quiet Things isn’t just a game, it’s about giving survivors a voice. Alice’s story is also many people’s stories, that never get heard. Dealing with themes around childhood abuse, self harm and suicide, we aim to tackle the shame and open conversations. We are stronger together.
2288520.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 俄语, 简体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
